definitions.es: Una frase utilizada para preguntar sobre el momento en que sucederá algo.
definitions.vi: Cụm từ được sử dụng để hỏi về thời gian một điều gì đó sẽ xảy ra.
definitions.en: A phrase used to ask about the time something will happen.

example.vi: Bạn sẽ đi du lịch bao giờ?

exampleSentences: Anh sẽ đi du lịch Đà Nẵng bao giờ cùng bạn bè?
Chị chưa biết bao giờ mình chuyển nhà sang nơi mới.
Em muốn hỏi bao giờ lớp học tiếng Việt bắt đầu.
notes_md:
**Bao giờ** means **when** (asking about time), usually about the **future or past**.

It’s a question word, so it can go at the beginning or the end of a question.  

It’s often about a specific event happening, not a general time. For very similar meaning, **khi nào** also means “when” and is often interchangeable, but *bao giờ* can feel a bit more direct about timing.

Not used to mean “whenever” — that would be different words like *bất cứ khi nào*.
definition: when (used in questions about time, usually in the future or past)
exampleSentencesTranslated: When will you travel to Da Nang with your friends?
I don’t know when I will move to the new place.
I want to ask when the Vietnamese class will start.
notes:
Bao giờ means when (asking about time), usually about the future or past.

It’s a question word, so it can go at the beginning or the end of a question.  

It’s often about a specific event happening, not a general time. For very similar meaning, khi nào also means “when” and is often interchangeable, but bao giờ can feel a bit more direct about timing.

Not used to mean “whenever” — that would be different words like bất cứ khi nào.
